# External Reference Documents

Place external documents (MOD security policies, JSP 440 / JSP 604 extracts, customer Security Aspects Letters, customer accreditation reports, NCSC guidance) for project 002 in this folder. Supported formats include PDF and Word; `/arckit:*` commands will read them and embed inline citations into generated artefacts.

> **Classification note**: Material at OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE or higher must only be placed here if the local repository hosting environment is accredited to handle that classification. If in doubt, summarise content in your own words at OFFICIAL classification rather than placing the source document here.
